name: smalltalk
description: A unified CLI for installing and managing multiple Smalltalk implementations (Pharo, Cuis, GT, Squeak, GNU Smalltalk, LST, LS4)
author: Hernán Morales Durand

scripts.lint: shellcheck --severity=warning --external-sources bin/st libexec/*.sh install.sh tests/runSmalltalkTests tests/runStCollectEnv
scripts.format:check: shfmt -d -i 4 -ci -bn -sr -kp bin/st libexec/*.sh install.sh tests/runSmalltalkTests tests/runStCollectEnv
scripts.format: shfmt -w -i 4 -ci -bn -sr -kp bin/st libexec/*.sh install.sh tests/runSmalltalkTests tests/runStCollectEnv
